sql_array: CREATE TABLE t_nested_fuzz(t Tuple(nested Tuple(a UInt8, b Tuple(c String, d DateTime)), e Int32)) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT flattenTuple(t) FROM t_nested_fuzz WHERE multiIf(e > 2, flattenTuple(t).1, flattenTuple(t).2) = '2023-01-01';
CREATE TABLE t_complex_fuzz(t1 Tuple(a UInt32, b UInt32), t2 Tuple(c String, d Nullable(UInt32))) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT flattenTuple(t1) AS flat1, flattenTuple(t2) AS flat2 FROM t_complex_fuzz WHERE multiIf(flat1 = 3, flat2.2, flat2.1 IS NULL);
CREATE TABLE t_nested_join_fuzz(t1 Tuple(a String, b Tuple(c Nullable(Int32), d Int64)), t2 Tuple(e String, f UInt32)) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT flattenTuple(t1) AS flattened_t1, t2.e FROM t_nested_join_fuzz t1 JOIN t_nested_join_fuzz t2 ON multiIf(flattened_t1.2 IS NULL, flattenTuple(t2).f = 2, flattenTuple(t1).1 = 'row1');
CREATE TABLE t_boundary_fuzz(t Tuple(a Int32, b Float64, c String)) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT flattenTuple(t) FROM t_boundary_fuzz WHERE multiIf(c = '', flattenTuple(t).1 > 0, flattenTuple(t).2 < 2.0);
CREATE TABLE t_null_handling(t Tuple(a Nullable(Int32), b Array(UInt32))) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT flattenTuple(t) FROM t_null_handling WHERE multiIf(flattenTuple(t).1 IS NULL, 1, flattenTuple(t).2[1]) = 2;
